description: Legal record (#42) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 15r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated Tammuz 5321 AM (1561 CE). ʿAbd al-Maʿaṭī b. Khiḍr al-Fulādī leases a shop that is held in the communal qodesh on Darb al-Mudawwar for a period of eight months. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
